title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Home screen shows limited support message when a newly released but unsupported device is connected with empty LM version info after its launch date.
steps: Launch the app and pair with headset (headset ON and properly connected).
Verify connection status icon is a green ring with a black "i" icon on the top right corner.
Verify pop up displays message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited."
expected: Home screen shows limited support. Connection status icon is a green ring with a black "i" icon. Tapping the "i" icon shows a pop-up with message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
